emails.subject: Ag option control procedures
emails.body: Ag option control procedures Today I gave a presentation to the originators and traders in Gary Hickerson's ag group, including a proposal of control procedures for compliance with ag option restrictions. Gary was not present, but the procedures were well received by the group, who felt that they were practical and could be complied with. Attached is an outline of the presentation, including the proposed procedures. Bob Robert E. Bruce Senior Counsel Enron North America Corp. T (713) 345-7780 F (713) 646-3393 robert.bruce@enron.com
